name: Soviet Nostalgic TikTok Ad
description: Reference template (not a script generator) for a specific TikTok-ad format: off-screen deadpan young Russian narrator tells a two-era heritage story — a Soviet-era inventor created something, it was shelved, the modern heir revived it. The era flip mid-video is also a music drop (canonical Soviet trend bed → hip-hop). The narration stays in Russian — it's the format's signature; everything else (prompts, fragments, structural docs) is in English. Scenario is written fresh per project by /ralph-scenarist using this template as a vibe reference.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview через OpenRouter @ 1080×1920 PNG (multi-ref для character consistency)
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 + user-chosen voice_id (native Russian, never model-native TTS)
stackSummary.music: Soviet bed = REQUIRED canonical trend track at assets/trend-soviet-bed.mp3 (do not generate). Hip-hop bed = ElevenLabs Music через ralphy generate music (force_instrumental: true) или user-provided.
stackSummary.composition: Remotion 4.0.441 with TransitionSeries fade crossfades + dual-music split at era flip

trendSovietBed.note: TikTok trend audio — part of format recognition. Copy into project assets/music/ at scaffold time. Do not substitute with Lyria2 generation.

doNotCopyLiterally: Scenario, per-clip durations, VO line count and structure, exact tagline. All should be written fresh per project.
